ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bajaj Auto Limited has scheduled a Board Meeting for July 21, 2026, to consider and approve its unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, which will be submitted immediately thereafter. Concurrently, a routine trading window closure is in effect from July 1 to July 23, 2026, for designated persons, in compliance with SEBI insider trading regulations. This is a standard regulatory disclosure of an upcoming financial results announcement, with no apparent red flags or unusual material impacts beyond the anticipation of the company's Q1 FY27 performance data.
